summary: All seven conventional Excel error SCODEs and unknown negative SCODEs round-trip without replacing the signed payload.
Only rank-2 VT_ARRAY|VT_VARIANT decodes to AutomationArray; encoding uses one-based rank-2 SAFEARRAY(VARIANT).
Strict codecs reject non-finite numbers, embedded NUL, over-limit strings, lossy I8 conversion, short Excel error numbers, rank-1 arrays, nested arrays, and negative DateVariant.
